name: search_list
description: Execute a web search query using a Programmable Search Engine. Returns search results with titles, snippets, URLs, and metadata.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: cx
parameters.description: The Programmable Search Engine ID.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: API key for authentication.

parameters.name: num
parameters.description: Number of search results to return (1-10, default 10).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Index of the first result to return (1-based). Use for pagination.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to documents in a specific language (e.g., lang_en).

parameters.name: cr
parameters.description: Restrict results to documents originating in a specific country (e.g., countryUS).

parameters.name: dateRestrict
parameters.description: Restrict results by date (e.g., d5 for past 5 days, w2 for past 2 weeks, m1 for past month).

parameters.name: exactTerms
parameters.description: Phrase that all results must contain.

parameters.name: excludeTerms
parameters.description: Word or phrase to exclude from results.

parameters.name: fileType
parameters.description: Restrict results to a specific file extension (e.g., pdf, doc).

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Duplicate content filter: 0 (off) or 1 (on).

parameters.name: gl
parameters.description: Geolocation of end user (two-letter country code).

parameters.name: hl
parameters.description: User interface language.

parameters.name: hq
parameters.description: Additional search terms combined with AND logic.

parameters.name: imgColorType
parameters.description: Image color type filter: mono, gray, color, trans. Only for image search.

parameters.name: imgDominantColor
parameters.description: Image dominant color filter: black, blue, brown, gray, green, orange, pink, purple, red, teal, white, yellow.

parameters.name: imgSize
parameters.description: Image size filter: huge, icon, large, medium, small, xlarge, xxlarge.

parameters.name: imgType
parameters.description: Image type filter: clipart, face, lineart, stock, photo, animated.

parameters.name: orTerms
parameters.description: Additional search terms with OR logic.

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: Safe search level: active or off.

parameters.name: searchType
parameters.description: Search type: image (for image search) or omit for web search.

parameters.name: siteSearch
parameters.description: Restrict or exclude results from a specific site.

parameters.name: siteSearchFilter
parameters.description: Include (i) or exclude (e) siteSearch results.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort expression (e.g., date for date sorting).

parameters.name: rights
parameters.description: License filter for results (e.g., cc_publicdomain, cc_attribute).

items.title: Artificial Intelligence - Wikipedia
items.snippet: Artificial intelligence (AI) is intelligence demonstrated by machines...
